,
  IPaymentService.PaymentServiceDecoratorStack.g.cs:
using System;
using DesignPatterns.Structural;

#nullable enable
namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Provides a decorator stack for global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators", "1.0")]
    public static partial class PaymentServiceDecoratorStack
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Builds the decorator stack.
        /// </summary>
        public static global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService Build(global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService core)
        {
            return new DecoratorStackBuilder<global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService>().Build(core);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds the decorator stack asynchronously.
        /// </summary>
        public static ValueTask<global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService> BuildAsync(global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService core, global::System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(global::System.Threading.CancellationToken))
        {
            return new DecoratorStackBuilder<global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService>().Add((global::DesignPatterns.Structural.IAsyncDecorator<global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService>)new global::TestAssembly.AsyncLoggingDecorator()).BuildAsync(core, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.DecoratorGenerator

}
